subtitle: Dedicated to building modern, visually appealing, and functional websites.
about: A Software Developer with experience building full-stack web and mobile applications across oil & gas, healthcare, education, retail, and tourism sectors. Proficient in ASP.NET MVC, Django, Laravel, and Flutter, with PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Oracle SQL as primary databases. I approach development with focus on scalability, maintainability, and performance — from database architecture design to backend security and end-user documentation.
about2: I have contributed to various production systems, including an industrial well-monitoring automation platform for Pertamina Hulu Mahakam, real-time payment and ticketing integrations, barcode-based patient registration systems, e-learning and automated assessment platforms, and cross-platform mobile apps with real-time data synchronization across multiple sectors.
